items.title: Base Endurance Run
items.description: Run 8 km at a pace of 6:30 min/km. Focus on maintaining a steady heart rate in Zone 2 (130-145 bpm). Include a 10-minute warm-up and a 5-minute cool-down.

items.title: Strength Training Session
items.description: Perform a full-body weight training session focusing on compound movements: 3 sets of 10-12 reps for squats, deadlifts, bench press, and rows. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, complete 5x800m intervals at a pace of 5:00 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a relaxed pace of 7:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate in Zone 1 (below 130 bpm) to aid recovery.
